    • HotelStaffAccount

      public HotelStaffAccount(UUID uuid, String userName, Integer role)
      Returns an HotelStaffAccount object.
      Parameters:
      uuid - The UUID of the HotelStaffAccount.
      userName - The username of the HotelStaffAccount as a String.
      role - The role of the HotelStaffAccount as Integer
